description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막을 통해 생체 발광 영양분이 흐르는 미세한 생명력의 세계를 무중력의 진주빛 공간 속에서 탐구합니다.
description.en: A deep dive into the microscopic life-force, where bioluminescent nutrients flow through emerald membranes in a weightless, pearlescent void.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Cytoplasmic Drift.' A microscopic perspective of a rhythmic, breathing network composed of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D forest-green vascular filaments. The structure is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden bioluminescent sap move like viscous liquid silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro photography focus on internal capillary systems and translucent textures. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene organic movement.
